description_long: This coatrack features a modern, sculptural design with three spherical nodes arranged vertically along a gently curving central stem. The spheres are evenly spaced and increase in size from bottom to top, with the largest sphere at the top serving as the primary hanging point. The stem is anchored to a wide, circular base that provides stability. The overall form is minimalist, with smooth, unadorned surfaces and a monochromatic finish. The design lacks visible hooks, instead relying on the spherical nodes for hanging items. Its aesthetic is both functional and decorative, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, minimalist coatrack with three smooth spheres on a curving stem and a circular base, finished in a uniform color.
description_view_0: Curved stem with three spheres visible, showing the dynamic, flowing shape from a diagonal angle.
description_view_1: Front view with all three spheres aligned vertically, highlighting the symmetry and central axis.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, showing the opposite side of the curved stem and spheres.
description_view_3: Rear view with spheres aligned vertically, mirroring the front but from the opposite side.
